metadata.name: Handle a Reefer Container Temperature Alarm

description: The terminal monitoring system sends an alert that a refrigerated (reefer) container's temperature is out of range.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the alarm and identify the reefer container's ID and location.

expected_outcome.value: Operator identifies the container and its location in the reefer racks.

nodes.task_description: Check the container's required temperature settings from the cargo documentation.

expected_outcome.value: Operator confirms the required temperature is -18°C, but the current reading is -10°C.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a reefer technician to the container's location to diagnose and fix the issue.

expected_outcome.value: A work order is created and dispatched to the on-duty technician.
